rulings.Case Title: BELLAIRE TOWER HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION, VS. GOLDEN STATE BROADCASTING LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
rulings.Rulings: Granted. Plaintiff and cross-defendant Bellaire Tower Homeowners Association ("Bellaire") is the prevailing party. Its requested attorney fees and costs are reasonable given the nature of the appeal to which it was required to respond, and defendant and cross-complainant Golden State Broadcasting LLC ("Golden State") has not not shown that the requested fees are unreasonable in any respect. Bellaire is awarded, and Golden State is ordered to pay, fees of $67,335.50 and costs of $5,783.37 for a total of $73,119.87. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise the opposing party and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:30 p.m. on Wednesday, August 24, 2016.
